creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have alternatives (tomcat85 or other):
devel/opengrok
www/axis2
www/madsonic

Mandatory dependent from tomcat7:
devel/gitblit
www/jspwiki
www/sakai
graphics/deegree-csw
graphics/deegree-igeoportal
graphics/deegree-wcs
graphics/deegree-wfs
graphics/deegree-wms
graphics/deegree-wps
graphics/deegree-wpvs
graphics/barbecue

Probably they can work with tomcat85 and/or with tomcat9, but the maintainers have to test self.

Is it possible to send notifications to the maintainers with warning: "update or port will be removed at 2021-06-20"?
